ayahs.translation: All compliments, prayers and pure words are due to Allah

ayahs.arabic: السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ وَرَحْمَةُ اللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
ayahs.translation: Peace be upon you, Oh Prophet, and the mercy of Allah and His blessings

ayahs.arabic: السَّلَامُ عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَى عِبَادِ اللَّهِ الصَّالِحِينَ
ayahs.translation: Peace be upon us and on the righteous slaves of Allah

ayahs.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
ayahs.transliteration: Ash-hadu allaa ilaaha illallaah wa ash-hadu anna Muhammadan 'abduhu wa rasooluh
ayahs.translation: I bear witness that there is no God or deity worthy of worship except Allah, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His slave and Messenger
